# Differences for itemtypes.txt

*Key column used: `ItemType`*

## Added Columns in BK (New)
`UICategory, RunewordCategory1, RunewordCategory2, Restricted`

- colossal jewel
- crafted sunder charm
- grimoire
- warlock item
